# Patrick Ngenzi Portfolio

This is the professional portfolio for Patrick Ngenzi, focused on cybersecurity, identity and access management, cloud security, DevSecOps, network security, secure web platforms, and server management.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://ngenzipack.github.io/portfolio/)
- [Projects](https://ngenzipack.github.io/portfolio/projects/)
- [Resume](https://ngenzipack.github.io/portfolio/resume/)
- [Contact](https://ngenzipack.github.io/portfolio/contact/)

## Key Topics

- Security Analyst
- IAM Analyst
- Cloud Security
- SOC/NOC Operations
- Network Security
- DevSecOps
- Microsoft Entra ID
- Azure Security
- Microsoft Sentinel
- Server Management
